name: Ginger Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Brown bean paste (or soybean paste)
1 Serrano chili, stemmed and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Use the sauce immediately or within 6 hours for best flavor.
4. This thick, dark, rich, and spicy sauce pairs well with bland foods like tofu as a dipping sauce.
